stemHtml: From a polar curve of the entire aeroplane one can read:

options.a: the minimum drag coefficient and the maximum lift.
options.b: the minimum drag and the maximum lift.
options.c: the maximum C<sub>L</sub>/C<sub>D </sub>ratio and maximum lift coefficient.
options.d: the minimum C<sub>L</sub>/C<sub>D</sub> ratio and the minimum drag.
